name: Bank of America® Customized Cash Rewards Secured Credit Card

welcome_offer.description: Earn a $200 cash rewards bonus after making at least $1,000 in purchases in the first 90 days of account opening.

earning_rates.notes: 6% (3% + 3% first-year bonus) in your choice of category for the first year. Choose from: gas, online shopping, dining, travel, drug stores, or home improvement/furnishings. On up to $2,500/quarter, then 1%
On up to $2,500 combined with choice category per quarter. Automatic 2% at grocery stores and wholesale clubs.

other_benefits.name: Credit Building
other_benefits.description: Help strengthen or build your credit history

other_benefits.name: Fraud Protection
other_benefits.description: Zero Liability protection for unauthorized transactions
